title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at PhonePe South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at PhonePe South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
PhonePe South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PhonePe South Asia Partners:
PhonePe South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe South Asia Partners!
